description: A new gym facility with showers has been added to the ground floor of the 4StoreyBuilding. Model its Domestic Hot Water (DHW) usage by creating a Fraction-type Day Schedule named 'Gym-DHW-Day' with 1.0 usage from 07:00-09:00 and 17:00-19:00, and 0.1 at all other times. Create a Week Schedule named 'Gym-DHW-Week' applying this profile to Monday-Friday and a 0.1 usage profile to weekends and holidays. Update the 'DHW Loop' Process Flow to 5.0 GPM and assign the 'Gym-DHW-Week' schedule to it. Run the simulation and save the project.
